title: Bacon Pie (Quiche)
ingredients: 6-8 pieces of bacon, cooked and crumbled
instructions: Preheat oven to 450 degrees with rack in middle of oven.
Line pie dish with pie crust and crimp edges.
Place crumbled bacon in bottom of pie crust and top with cheese.
In blender, combine eggs, half-n-half, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
Blend well for a few seconds.
Pour egg mixture into pie crust.
Bake at 450 degrees for 15 minutes without opening oven door.
Turn oven temperature down to 350 degrees and cook quiche for additional 25 minutes or until it appears set.
Remove from oven and let cool for about 5 minutes before cutting.
notes: For speed, use Pillsbury refrigerated pie crust
Can use ½ whole milk and ½ half-n-half instead of all half-n-half
Do not open oven door during the first 15 minutes of baking
Let cool for about 5 minutes to set before cutting
